title: GSK AREXVY EXPANSION (RSV VACCINE)
headline: GSK wins FDA approval to expand Arexvy RSV vaccine to at-risk adults ages 18-49, marking significant label broadening.

title: CHINA CELL THERAPY FDA CLEARANCE
headline: Shanghai-based Unixell receives FDA clearance to begin U.S. cell therapy trial, marking first for Chinese biotech in this category.

title: LILLY GLP-1 COMPOUNDER WARNINGS (CONTINUATION)
headline: Eli Lilly escalates warnings that compounded GLP-1 drugs may be "dangerous," intensifying conflict with compounding pharmacies.

title: PFIZER CEO COMPENSATION
headline: Pfizer CEO Albert Bourla received $27.6 million in total 2025 compensation, up from $24.6 million in 2024.
key_facts: Executive:** Albert Bourla, CEO; 2025 pay:** $27.6 million total compensation; 2024 pay:** $24.6 million (for comparison); Change:** +$3.0 million year-over-year (+12.2% increase)

title: BAYER/ROCHE INDUSTRY CONDUCT DISPUTE
headline: Bayer found to have "discredited industry" following dispute with Roche, according to industry body or regulatory finding.

title: GILEAD YEZTUGO PREP MANUFACTURING FOCUS
headline: Gilead highlights manufacturing as key priority for Yeztugo (lenacapavir) PrEP rollout, per company executive.

title: 2026 PATENT CLIFF PRESSURES
headline: Major patent expirations push biopharma industry toward more challenging 2026 financial environment.
key_facts: Timing:** 2026 patent expirations; Impact:** Industry financial pressures; Context:** Multiple products losing exclusivity simultaneously

title: HYLORIS ANTIVIRAL FDA REJECTION
headline: FDA rejects Hyloris antiviral application due to manufacturing issues.

title: LAG-3 PHASE 3 FAILURE (CONTINUATION)
headline: LAG-3 cancer immunotherapy pioneer fails in Phase 3 trial, adding to setbacks for once-promising target.
key_facts: Target:** LAG-3 (lymphocyte-activation gene 3) checkpoint inhibitor; Stage:** Phase 3 failure; Context:** "Pouring more cold water on a once-hot cancer target"; Characterization:** Developer described as "LAG-3 pioneer"

title: ULTRAGENYX GENE THERAPY PHASE 3 SUCCESS (CONTINUATION)
headline: Ultragenyx gene therapy hits primary endpoint in Phase 3 trial for blood ammonia disease (urea cycle disorder).

title: PFIZER CLOSES IGNITE R&D UNIT
headline: Pfizer shuts down Ignite, its R&D services unit created to support small biotech companies.

title: NOVARTIS COSENTYX PEDIATRIC HS APPROVAL
headline: Novartis receives FDA approval for Cosentyx in pediatric patients aged 12+ with moderate to severe hidradenitis suppurativa.

title: LILLY CHINA $3 BILLION EXPANSION (CONTINUATION)
headline: Eli Lilly announces $3 billion production expansion in China focused on oral solid dosage manufacturing.

title: ORPHAN DRUG MARKET PROJECTION
headline: Orphan drug sales projected to exceed $400 billion by 2032, per industry report.
key_facts: Market size:** >$400 billion in orphan drug sales; Timeframe:** By 2032; Growth driver:** Report projects "surge"; Segment:** Orphan/rare disease drugs
